pages.text:
31 mai 1937

WHEREAS Ior the purpose of confirming

the Modifications to the International Convention for the

Creation of an Institute of Refrigeration, signed at

Paris on June 21st, 1920, recommended by the General conference of the International Institute of Refrigera- tion et their meeting on the 23rd November, 1934, a new convention has been prepared to that end, and lies open

Ior signature in the Archives of the French Government unt11 May 31st, 1937;

AND WHEREAS It 18 expedient that a fIt

and proper person be invested mith full power to sign the

Bald Convention on behall of the Government of the Union of south Africa;

NOW THEREFORE, I, Jen Christiean smuts,

Acting Prime Minister end Acting Minister for Ezternal

Affairs of the Union of South Africa, do hereby declare and make known that the Government of the Union of south

Africa have authorsed and appointed and do by these presents appoint

MIR. ERIC HENDRIK LOUW

Envor Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentlary for the

Union of south Africa in Frence, to be their plenipotentlary wIth full power and authority to sign the sald Conrention on behall of the Union of South Africa.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I have signed these

presents at capetori on thiä the fifth day of May in the

JeaI of Our Lord One Thousand Nine Hundred and Ihirty-seren.

Usmus-
